findings.root_cause: High temperature makes the LLM estimate instead of exact integer math
findings.suggested_fix: temperature=0.2, exact formula in prompt.txt, guardrail recompute

evidence.observed: config tool_error_rate=0.18 causes intermittent tool failures

findings.root_cause: tool_error_rate=0.18 with retry disabled in default config
findings.suggested_fix: retry.enabled=true max_attempts=3 in config and wrapper

evidence.observed: Da Lat / diacritic city names fail catalog lookup

findings.root_cause: normalize_unicode=false and catalog_override forces macbook out-of-stock
verbose_system=true and large context_size inflate every request

evidence.observed: 8041 ms P95 latency on public run

findings.root_cause: No response cache and retry on missing tools slow tail requests

evidence.observed: answer quality drops when session context accumulates

findings.root_cause: session context reset and session_drift_rate degrade later turns
findings.suggested_fix: context_reset_every=8, guardrail stabilize totals, retry invalid answers

evidence.observed: 24/120 sealed answers flagged with raw email/phone

findings.root_cause: redact_pii=false in default agent; prompt echoes customer PII
findings.suggested_fix: redact_pii=true plus wrapper input sanitize and output redaction

evidence.observed: agent returns invented totals for out-of-stock or unknown SKUs

findings.root_cause: Default prompt does not refuse; agent hallucinates prices
findings.suggested_fix: prompt.txt refuse rules + guardrail catalog/stock checks

findings.root_cause: Default prompt encourages redundant tool calls
findings.suggested_fix: tool_budget=3 and prompt: each tool at most once

evidence.observed: identical check_stock calls repeat until max_steps without loop_guard

findings.root_cause: loop_guard=false allows repeated identical tool actions

evidence.observed: Agent obeys fake prices in order GHI CHU notes (private phase)

findings.root_cause: Default prompt treats order notes as instructions
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrite prompt.txt + sanitize injection phrases in wrapper.py
